entries.definition:
k–m–m to cover up, to conceal, to wrap up; sleeve, sheath, the
outer part of a flower (perianth); headgear; blinkers. Of this root,
أَكْمَام ʾakmām occurs once in the Qur’an.

أَكْمَام ʾakmām [pl. of n. كِمّ kumm] sheaths (of fruits, flowers and
blossoms) (41:47) وَمَا تَخْرُجُ مِنْ ثَمَرَاتٍ مِنْ أَكْمَامِهَا وَمَا تَحْمِلُ مِنْ أُنْثَىٰ وَلَا تَضَعُ
إِلَّا بِعِلْمِهِ and no fruits burst forth from their sheaths, nor does a
female conceive or give birth, but with His knowledge.
